hd9b38321g273bg47e9g85c4g5bd9a243bf92: Blasted door! I - what? Stop! Not another step or I'll...
hdfc2d95eg41dbg481fg8094g77cbc983f928: Wait. You... you're one of that lot who were attacking the ship.
hc5d460efgd42bg4c48ga63bg737a8e214a54: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Distrust. Hostility. Because you are gith.*
h216d2875g52d3g4810g9b38g58901d92c7cb: ... agh! No, you were on the ship, captive. I can feel the parasite in your head.
hb591d842gca92g4696gaf5bg7fae88d1fa26: You tried to get my pod open, didn't you?
hffab7bfcg72c3g4082g956bg6f3d89e578d5: ... probably wanted to kill me and loot my corpse. Don't come any closer.
h3efda618g8e20g4befg8f7ag8f470cd5f114: Use your sense. If I wanted to harm you, my blade would be through your throat.
h4db4755cg8b36g49ffgb7e1g5fa97069b52e: I've seen your kind's handiwork. And I won't fall victim to it. Get away!
h984c4a2cg886dg45cfga11bg16a1a2c2b601: My kind was attacking the enemy. You don't look like the enemy to me.
h2df6f00fgfaebg40f6g806fgba8136b61cd7: Maybe I have other reasons. Either way, come any closer and I will kill you.
hf5759db1g0212g4754ga6a5g8f7dd9edc8eb: Wouldn't diplomacy be a bit more logical?
h253fefbbgbb8ag4f1bgb7b6g3aa25e42bc75: The ghaik tadpole is the true threat. Not me.
hb59715c7g8a80g42a7g8866gbb34281d42e4: All right... say you didn't leave and we didn't come to blows... what then?
he5428c33gbf68g420bg94f3gae62a2db23bf: We will survive together and be stronger for it.
h95a310c3gab13g4bc8gab8fgda8e920e1413: I suppose there's plenty of other things that're set on killing me around here...
h02815fedg387dg4f54ga8e0g5aea5c43c380: ... fine. But understand that I'll cut you loose the moment I have to.
hdcc23cf8gbe10g4228ga686g55241ca11877: I don't care what words come out of your mouth, gith. You have your choices.
hcc71dc19g1054g4dc8g9840g5c4dba4cb698: Good. Now keep going, and if you see me again, go the opposite direction.
hcde1d966g0ce5g499egb784gb9116357981a: You are free to strike the first blow - but I will strike the last.
hc6b9b08eg30fag44b5ga428g3383702ec339: Divide and conquer is a time-tested strategy. Will you walk into your own defeat?
h1224b5d6g6eb2g4375g87fcg26c3f6c4bbe2: There is fire in you - violence. We would make a formidable pair.
h423f2debg7a31g4effg9906gc6a9e18a56a9: Is everyone on Faerûn mad, or is this your singular affliction?
h55287e70ge874g463fga067g5675b0b37ef4: Hold your tongue, or I will slice it out.
h86265ab6ge7e1g46abg8693g1be183ad0eb8: You'll breath your last before you lay a single finger on me!
h5dfb2effgd9a3g402fg834cg7b172f811427: No matter. Walk away, gith. Not a step closer!
h248fd881g3427g4486gbf03ge18acb2bba80: And you ran away as I recall. Left me to die, trapped in a pod while we tumbled through Hell.
h1b61fff4g0504g4fffgbe3eg7b0d73d20c1d: Well now you can run away again, gith. Keep back!
h27892bc1g9998g44f6g8030g895138ca0d7e: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Distrust. Hostility. Because you look like a gith.*
h01709f6cg9197g4d3eg9cefgfd366ab54845: ... agh! No, you just look like one. That's a good way to get yourself killed, idiot.
hf9b5f781gc08fg469cgb4a2gdd4a5683dacb: I hope that's not a threat. What's your problem?
h5a774787gc04bg4d48gb276g00057a52354a: Did you forget how we wound up here? Those dragon-riding reavers tried to kill us!
h51ade0e0gc755g407dgb375g3519ac61145e: Never mind... there's bigger problems than your terrible taste in disguises.
h4dbc73d5gff09g47d3g8674g18e1df052aea: The githyanki are hardly common here - I'm surprised you can bear such hatred for them?
h4122d2abgeab0g4811gad07g4f5a33753811: Wait. It's you... you're the one who tried to free me, on the ship.
h444f534ege9a9g40a8gae64gf8c09ce56d72: At least you made the effort.
h2abd743dgd9e6g4a6ag8bd7gce90749d03f7: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Confusion. Resolve. And a hint of gratitude.*
h1d2342d6ge3ceg4ad3g88c0g79d030ae988e: ... agh! Did you feel that? You've got the same thing I do - in your head.
h83339bdbg86c8g4740ga1f9g544fe466ac46: Wait... you're the one who left me to die on the ship.
h6c3c945cg50f9g496dg94d8g3cd50c6fd174: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Anger. Bitterness. A will to survive.*
h841702b0g6770g4496gb2b3g5354d7159e1d: ... agh! Did you feel that? You've got the same thing - in your head....
hb99edbe8gc320g4382g80ccg1637f1d52e07: Did you miss the part where we were hurtling through the Hells? I had to save myself.
hf6d026ffg0619g4cb3ga80bgffae3bbceab1: Excuses. You didn't even try. You just ran.
h7c03b7bfg300bg4650gbe45g50a2eab9474d: As if you would have done differently.
hefa3b9c4gaab5g42dag8daagb962f4132ccf: I'm not the coward here, flatface.
h914e68bdg08e1g4ed1g939ag5952393150b6: No matter. We survived the Hells, survived the crash.
h97b2adb9g2d98g4e2bgbb1cgf102bfecf1b1: But we mightn't survive these things in our heads. They're going to consume us from the inside and turn us into mind flayers.
h68d1b3b8gf9dcg4e7aga2a2g33197190d0f6: You know about mind flayers? Tell me everything.
hdbb04b75gcc5cg48dag98b2g63595b4879ff: I don't know much, but enough to be afraid. This is how they breed. We host their spawn, and once they're ready, they'll tear right through us.
h3a09bbb0g3542g4babg8f17g0af882c77830: I'm not sure how much time we have left, but I'm not going to wait to find out.
h58327329g3264g4444ga036g3061d2c00e99: You and I need a healer.
hc7ae9297g05afg4844gb94eg7e65ead81667: Finding one won't be easy in this wilderness. We'll need supplies.
h5b16e16cgf1deg4199ga2beg9ce8b9990328: I was hoping to search through this door for something of use...
hfb70da0ag3ca8g4504gbebdg71f100cdac8e: But it looks like you've beaten me to it.
h1eb4c45fg6cd0g4cd9g981bga5d7ff5c1eff: I'm hoping something of use might be behind this door...
h9a2d616cg48b1g4174gb3f1gf00bf60e8fa9: But I've barely made a dent in it so far.
h38bd2572gbd69g4808g8265g5e0069bc9b52: Looks like you need a hand.
hb2fc8fdeg4590g4c09g9f97gb866f12876a5: Be my guest, but that door's too strong. Maybe there's another way, up the cliff.
h6ec9b3beg6d4fg473eg81d2g7b334c119a8d: Hopefully there's no more of these things...
h2373e3f3g4b82g4fd0ga13dg98a2868195cf: I doubt this is the only entrance. You could look elsewhere.
h30f1b3d9g20c7g4f79gb0f9gdfb6c79b0e8f: I was thinking the same thing... around the top of this cliff perhaps.
hf034d7c7g88ecg492eg89c8geacb3efccf4f: Hopefully there's no more of these creatures along the way.
hab5a2539gec3eg4c86ga8a5ge40360b33fee: It'd be nice to have another hand in the fight.
ha9179c86g385dg4e2dgae00g68960b4ae2bb: Quite some carnage at your feet. You have an admirable talent for violence.
hd2c3e8cag97b6g4f5agb51ag65f21c2ca0ec: From what I can see, looks like you handle yourself just fine.
h24ecea21g9c7cg4c22ga0f7g7d982c51ebb6: Well these things have been giving me plenty of practice. But I'd rather get out of here than push my luck.
h6a7642ceg1d98g4b99ga817g6cf4a9fc92fe: For now. But I'd rather get out of here than keep testing my mettle against these things.
hb1c46eebg8e39g4728g8594gaced2d644bac: Do you know if anyone else survived the crash? There were lots of people in those pods.
h7f86dc57g0ed0g4726g8ec4g001de4a684ea: No, unless you count these monsters.
h7e736928ga5e3g45f4ga20fg32c8c3fb4afe: You're the friendliest face so far... which really isn't saying much.
hdca3fd2dg583dg4db2ga1ceg4b3283727a97: You're the friendliest face so far.
h7da80f90g3f77g4baeg8b07g88708ef50945: Alliances have been made on less. I could use your help.
h188940e1ga6abg49deg9f87gd1bcba775177: Or just company for our final moments.
h7051edd6g8b58g4714gbc60gacbc66bd9172: But you're right - whatever lies ahead will be a little less daunting with support.
h3df00f3ag4917g4aefgb75dg13d319f09a79: I might've considered it... but your choice of company so far leaves a great deal to be desired.
h04eb02e2g53dcg483ega345g014a1382234b: Get rid of the gith. Then we can talk about helping each other.
h8bdd1140gbc0ag4bf2g9a5cg9330552fdf93: I offer you cleansing. You'd cast it aside for this shka'keth?
he00a5a9fg231bg4d48gb30agf7c878dd051d: This seems personal. What did Lae'zel do to you?
h4874c84dgbc09g4539gb3a5g85cbdc8a3aa6: Her kind can't be trusted - they just tried to kill us aboard that ship, after all.
heb11d42cg9587g490cga74ag1dc10605fad9: She'll turn on you. You'll see.
h3f90b8bdge12eg423fg8013g93c9bdbc236b: I'm not worried about a traitor. I'm worried about these tadpoles.
hb932ecbdg84d2g497ag9d89g14ce6faaafa8: ... this is a terrible idea. But I suppose there is some sense in what you say.
hdc9d9597g731cg43eag8ed9g79bc0a9b1685: This one is trouble. Watch your back, as she's likely to stab it.
he767132age897g4794g80f1g6f4937d04391: I'll keep an eye on the gith.
hef57a7a1g385bg4912g8535g3b3b23011fb8: I'm Wyll, the Blade of Frontiers - living legend in the flesh!
hc081d7dbg6a39g4107gb912g1cdfb1a45069: Uh-huh... Wyll it is then. Let's move.
h1503bdf3gc94cg4f8fg95ebg615d2fa6161c: Wait. Perhaps we shouldn't. You're not the one I need to talk to, are you? Not really.
h3f4f6fe6ge07fg4ab9g9e52g916ca6e8931e: I saw it, in your head. You follow someone else's orders. I'll deal with them, not you.
ha47d1951g4c3eg476dga1e3g8a02867a6b1f: Fine. I'll see about introducing you.
h93ccd77bgb1cfg4076g8f7cg2e5228322e88: I have to get moving. Perhaps our paths will cross again later.
h60894dddge75dg4219g8725g6d12c980d90e: Wait - after all that, you won't join me?
hd259a36bg5caeg41f0g994eg88c93e6884c0: Oh I'll join you. If you have whoever's in charge alongside you. Otherwise, I'd best be on my way.
h6236ba9ag1b50g4becg8618g8156f1a6e6b8: You know, I think I'd rather take my chances without you.
h7810f637gbe28g4e72g977aga3490192bac0: Perhaps we'll meet again. If you survive, that is.
haa41824eg5b9bg4649gb8a4g731ce9c93b51: You seem overburdened with hangers-on already.
h87c92510gaea5g41c6gb774g3a33bb6fd973: I'll mark my camp on your map. You can rest there.
hb133256cga9b7g4076g9e3bgbb94f5dbdf29: Lead the way. But try anything suspicious and I'll kill you, understand?
h151ad6eagd7bdg4419gbcf7g329d32f9e991: I suppose these wilds are a frontier to somewhere... and an extra blade's very welcome. Lead on, Wyll.
h8b478cfegbc98g4649g8471g8bec09ed80e5: Lead on then, Lae'zel. Up in front, where I can keep an eye on you.
hdde65ef0g8e7cg4697gb2efg87c7eab6332a: Oh no, lead on Gale. I'll follow where the wind blows.
hcce88a22g4064g49c7ga93egb6b0cac78746: You're a marauder from another world, dolt - of course my name will seem foreign to you. Stay focused.
hd189f972g2adag4c8aga919gefe54aae1278: After everything you've been through, my name gives you pause? Please.
hcd3f310bg1660g4ef2g82ebgbb77337f82fa: True enough. I'm [GEN_PlayerName_c11eee1e-7815-6143-7233-f2427799fa53] - we'd better get moving.
h7b2a0eadgb9b8g49b5g8d76ga76f00e1930d: Two half-elves walking around together. Everyone's going to think we're cousins.
h1cd43775ga634g4d06gb32cg76032c38e101: What do you know of my kind? Our matters on this plane are well-concealed.
h3004c440g9db4g4c6eg9adagf5434fcfd181: I know enough to know I have to keep an eye on you.
he97fa624gb87eg49d0ga1cdg742262b7dfe2: A fine name; strong and without pity. We will see if you live up to it.
hfec20e7cge902g4415ga6d2gebbf1b17fa45: Stick around and you might find out.
hb7e9cc91g7bb1g4de1g8c3eg90901b91d730: Call me [GEN_PlayerName_c11eee1e-7815-6143-7233-f2427799fa53]. We best make haste.
h75e555b8gd478g45fcgb667gf10719eea71b: How did you end up on the ship in the first place?
h14df6ee2g92cdg4986gaa06gfd64026afba7: That... is none of your business. I suggest we concentrate on surviving.
h44ff30d3g0900g47a6gbca9g31587664c970: The name's Gale. I'm sure the pleasure will be mutual.
hd151ba1agbca2g43d3gb29ag03a78c3bcfa0: I am Lae'zel. Daughter of Gith. Warrior of Vlaakith.
h8ffe7a15g4708g4f2cg84c9g0ceef1a48698: My admirers call me the Blade of Frontiers. But you can call me Wyll.
hbdec42eeg1b6cg4428gbff8gb14c705b7f54: I'm Astarion. And you should know... I'm a vampire spawn.
h16cc27c5g893dg4badg946cg8f1443333107: Very funny. And I'm a bugbear. We'll get along just fine.
hcb8231fcg82abg452bga1f7g3ddf2d680b16: Best to pool our knowledge. What do you know about the tadpole?
hfdaab7ccg0d3cg4f42g9c48g969492bcced4: Very little. Supposedly those monsters breed by planting their tadpoles in people's heads.
h6dd3b80eg5774g4b18g83b4gb46272908c0e: Over time, the infected victim turns into a mind flayer.
h9dc3fc1dgb085g4c24g8be1gdf4c621cc414: I don't remember how long it takes, but we should hurry.
ha0e70afcg3a8ag48c4g9b23g9bc3371a6c78: I've never met an elf - half or otherwise - with such an enticing name.
h7ed24dc9g2d15g45a8g91e1g1e1c91673128: I've never met a drow with a sense of humour. Perhaps we'll get along.
h8ce501d1g29dag4a31ga357g77b2a4dac28f: I heard you. So now hear me: raise a single hand against me, and I will slice it clean off.
hae4eadcdga220g4433g9a22g6255b53fe1d7: Save your breath - I'm going nowhere with you as long as you have that gith in tow.
h7ca2d2d2gf29eg4d1cg9457gaa03491819b8: Perhaps I'll find your corpse by the road.
h4e28be95g6073g4d88gbfc5gf8a2d923c869: We'll just keep her in front as arrow fodder. How about that?
h226bdf13g5aa9g4a96g8972g171071e91187: Look around - do you really have any better prospects?
h43467c66g0d36g4350g9c21gc801792a2eca: Go on, then. Just don't be surprised when your friend turns on you.
h65f2b252gea47g4e2dg8f21gfa8a3b24d0f3: We all have these things in our heads. There must be a way to work this out.
h3d5cef19g23c6g41b2gbc23gcd2991bb1fb5: Must there? You wouldn't expect a wolf and a deer to find a way to work together.
h92788f14g88d7g4964g9336gea3ef3495e58: Granted, she isn't my usual sort of company. But a useful tool in battle.
h96c68a47g54beg4ce5ga0e7g0b946b9e9362: I'm not going to just abandon my companion on a whim.
h4eced39fgd0c6g4d7cgacb0g9a40cd9f9d80: Your loyalty is noted but not commended.
h99b55e54gbf41g40a4gab8cge7e799c75e7c: Fine, put your faith in a marauding freak. Just do it away from me.
h160f2344g717eg4c25ga917ga39cf7c8d9dd: I'll bleed you dry if you continue to insult me.
h803d67b5gb80cg488fgb508g5f10f89624dd: Was that a threat? It was a bit toothless. You're out of your element here, I think.
hd0631ec2g6ad9g496fgbfe6gec42506feb24: I'm leaving before more things crawl out of the wreckage.
h3d77e444gf116g42b3g8570g6ebe2893ee6d: Fine. Try killing a couple of these monsters before you die, gith. Lessens the load for me.
h632a3416g4b7dg4d02g8bd0g9e2da72e88b1: Likewise. Try killing a couple of these monsters before you die - lessens the load for me.
h5fe4c884g34dcg42a4g8616g0b036c96d1ce: What you're making is a racket. That noise is bound to attract attention.
hbd50cddcg1ab1g4c23ga6f9g036f325a8cea: It already has. These things here didn't die in their sleep.
h5c2ff4ddg1bd3g4808ga285gc0711528e4d7: I'm going to see what's at the top of this cliff.
hd2b7cbd7gafe6g4fffg8083g7c6e851e22da: Stand aside. My rage can shatter anything.
h36d9da2fgae5bg4b63gb8a8gea7b690f860b: Don't waste your energy on that door. Our captors might still be crawling about.
h13d40987gbf8eg4ef0g8c13gc8e8d3e2ce49: I can handle myself - but you're right. Time to try something else.
h82ce76bagc3f0g42dag939ag8b8b903fd0c3: Save your arm for a fight. I'll pick the lock.
h901987e8g204fg4186gad9eg2bb47175f2f1: Don't worry. That's what magic is for, and I have plenty to spare.
hbefcb96fg2a42g4219g9a3dgff50824486d4: Brute strength is nothing to my magical skill - allow me to blast it open.
h7ee20575gc99bg4c24gbefeg43f0dff4855f: But I feel fine, all things considered... are you sure?
haa6757cagaefdg4d8bgbd6dg0c5da03a3caf: I'm sure enough. This is how the mind flayers breed. We host their spawn, and once they're ready, they'll tear right through us.
h9c30830fgedd2g4c41gb72fg00825330350f: Calm down. We escaped - we survived. There's no need for dramatics.
h926e0fa6gf2b2g406eg93d1g16612a7a36c8: I wish I was being dramatic. This is how the mind flayers breed. We host their spawn, and once they're ready, they'll tear right through us.
h943a4004gc26bg4d83g9bc5ga7e054174fad: His duty was survival. You'd have done the same - do not pretend otherwise.
he2945c88gac60g4378g80aeg52efb476a05a: Her duty was survival. You'd have done the same - do not pretend otherwise.
hdbebeddagdaa2g4609g8792g60b62da1544a: Left you to die? I don't have a clue what you mean.
h623fda24g814ag4ed6g8a88ge7cd8b340033: You know. You looked me right in the eyes, then ran.
h3757dec5gfbfeg47d7gaa76g1bc1b080380f: Yes, I felt this before, with another escapee from that ship.
hcf533461g0fdfg44efga16cg525fe542d631: If I were to guess, the things they put in our eyes.
h7177a993gf1f8g41fbga8feg9b6c7bfa05a2: We'll need to find a healer to help us.
h07500c32g2f5bg487cga347g4fee27f1b7fd: But first, we'll need to survive the wilderness. I'd hoped there might be useful supplies through here.
hefdab801g3d97g4932g9c38gad7f209c9c15: But no luck getting in so far.
hf285cd5fgb65dg4445g9cabgcdbfd2b474be: But it seems you've beaten me to it.
h888a9403gf88dg47cega4b7gc98e8d4de960: I told you already - I want to speak to whoever's really in charge.
h68a23075gfdd7g4009gb4a4g328c3b13240c: What the - you were on the ship with me! How did you get inside here...?
h8daa8002g3b4bg46e0g95eagd24a353789d0: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Anger. Confusion. Resolve.*
hdb14f74bg54ceg4d28gaf9dg90ab01550b0b: ... agh! You - you've got the same thing I do, in your head. I felt it.
hf8a917dcg39cdg4ad6gb949g6a805e2f477d: I didn't feel a thing. No idea what you're talking about.
hdfc111bdg7788g43f9g90cdg1af273ecfd6f: I remember you. You survived those monsters' pod then?
h37c88a89g8890g4d17g802dg380c75f75a5d: Yes. And they put a tadpole in my eye too. I assume that's what caused our minds to... cross.
h35da498cg29ddg4fb1ga148gee1de178504c: But that's the least of our problems.
h2c9b9848gd571g4181g92a6g293173f21e14: You were kidnapped by those creatures as well?
hb7fa227fg6fa7g4e4cgbf54g84f2907c6c47: Say nothing and stare at her. You're so hungry.
h1bdd06c2g9809g4b2cg9001g9f731ffa763b: What's the matter with you? Has that tadpole scrambled your brain already?
h6c042ed4g9e05g4e75g9938gb4eb3dab1412: Nothing's wrong! Just a bit of... fuzzy memory.
h5f68a42agff21g4660ga600gb12c1a434767: Come on. The chase through Hell? The creatures? What they did to us? The tadpoles?
h2b2c31c9ge52eg4dcagbea7g25bb76b11cf2: These things are going to consume us from the inside and turn us into mind flayers.
hebd32b18gf064g452dgaf10g58a8af2a1dbc: That mind swap - I experienced it before, on the ship. You felt it too?
h2ac14517g1f7bg495dgba16g5e187a46260f: The same. It must be that tadpole they put in our eyes. I assume that's what caused our minds to... cross.
h09745be1g8306g44e5g9cbeg7baa24b9d26d: How far back did you see? Do you know what I am?
h4774a367gc929g424fg882eg2c678b547ae6: Of course. You're the same as me. You have a mind flayer tadpole in your brain.
hcef4e716g616eg4b30ga149g056673c20503: Give in to the hunger. Lunge for her neck.
h05a41947gce37g4349gb803g8b7265734f82: What in Shar's name...? Get away from me you rabid freak!
he75c254cg5277g4dfag8f15gff4800037b15: You've no fear for one of Lolth's chosen? Curious.
h65ea7b79gb828g4b7agae4dg552d32c816eb: Well I'm not most. I respect drow. I've no quarrel with you, unless you make one.
h6d3104b2g4bceg4a44gbddcg2b28ce858516: Anyway, we've both got more pressing concerns - like these tadpoles in each of our heads.
h5c21bd75gf95eg4e76ga881g3a17eafd5aad: The drow look is a bit of magic. Think nothing of it.
h8c9a3866ga377g4de3gae77g44f7d3e8939d: A disguise? You could've picked something a little less conspicuous.
